stmt: ∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z : α, (((x * y) * z) * x) = (x * y) * z
∀ {α : Type u} [AutomatedTheoryConstruction.SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z : α, ((x * y) * (z * x)) = (x * y) * z
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z : α, (((x * y) * z) * z) = (x * y) * z
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z : α, (x * y) * ((x * y) * z) = (x * y) * z
∀ {α : Type u} [AutomatedTheoryConstruction.SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ e : α, (∀ x : α, e * x = e) → ∀ x : α, x * e = e
∀ {α : Type u} [AutomatedTheoryConstruction.SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ e f : α, ((∀ x : α, x * e = e) ∨ (∀ x : α, e * x = e)) → ((∀ x : α, x * f = f) ∨ (∀ x : α, f * x = f)) → e = f
∀ {α : Type _} [AutomatedTheoryConstruction.SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ e f : α, (∀ x : α, e * x = e) → (∀ x : α, f * x = f) → e = f
∀ {α : Type _} [AutomatedTheoryConstruction.SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ e f : α, (∀ x : α, e * x = e) → (∀ x : α, x * f = f) → e = f
∀ {α : Type u} [AutomatedTheoryConstruction.SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z : α, (x * y) * (z * y) = (x * z) * y
